reviews.review_title: Why isn't this cross-buy with the Rift?
reviews.review_description:
Pretty much standard these days.

I've already owned both the PSVR & Steam versions for years now (as well as the sequel for both the Quest & Steam versions).

I'd just assumed that it'd be cross-buy here.

Was this somehow an oversight?

Rating based on lack of cross-buy, which should be standard if there's also a Rift version available.

Playing this with my son,  Its a very physical game but you can tell it's an early days VR game.

The way it blinks you from scenario to scenario is kind of dumb, way worse than just an animated transition.

In co-op when you die you need to wait until your buddy dies ,  Inwish there was a way you could just rejoin.

Some enemies are super cheese and can shoot you while in cover through objects with red lazers.

Its frustrating.

Crisis VRigade 2 is a hundred, no, a thousand tkmes better. Crisis VRigade, Nintendo 64 style graphics, even the rookie level is set to gruelling.
Crisis VRigade 2 is a platinum, Dom Perignon champagne, Michelin 3 star, Oscars VR app of the year, gold awards level app. Anyone who says that Crisis VRigade 2 is the best game in the history of VR would not be wrong either objectively nor subjectively such as time travel is time experienced on an objective level. Linear time is the subjective experience of the algorithm of time.
Crisia VRigade 3 is ostensibly or otherwise in development. If otherwise, then this is the much awaited VR app of the century so far. If CV 4. 5, 6 etc are coming down the pike as well that would be absolutely mind-blowing.
Get this app. Support the developers in gratitude for making Crisis VRigade 2 which to say it is a masterpiece would be an understatement. Cris VRigade 2 is profound and stunning and spectacular and is absolutely 100% perfect. Chef's kiss.

I have Crisis Brigade 2, it allows for the option to auto reload or reload with a button. My left hand is paralyzed so I’m not able to use the left controller. I like the game so I bought this one but I am unable to reload with the button. Is there anyway to set this up.so I turned it on today and everything worked fine

developer_response.body: Hello, in settings you can choose between manual reload and auto reload. Please, let me know if you have any issue.

reviews.review_description: I’ve had this for allmost a year now, and still there is nothing new that i have noticed, but it’s an amazing project that i would love to see evolve with more choices.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. The evolution is Crisis VRigade 2. You have it available on App Lab.

reviews.review_description: Game is a lil Awkward being left-handed and everything is made to be right hand it it would be nice if they had an option to switch that maybe you guys could fix it later but all in all the game is OK just awkward. I think the developer should try playing the game left handed and see if it’s any easier for him.

developer_response.body: just pick the weapon with your left hand, like you would do it in real life.

reviews.review_description: This is a very good game puts you right in the game I would recommend it to anyone

reviews.review_title: Stutter and  frame drops on Quest2
reviews.review_description: Just got this via the App Lab method on Quest2 disappointed with perfomance as others have said theres a significant amount of stutter. Makes game not that enjoyable sadly. Looking forward to an update that will fix it 🙏

developer_response.body: This was fixed in the last update!

reviews.review_description: I love time crisis and this is basically the same game but sometimes it doesn’t jump me to the correct spot and I lose because it jumps me to far forward And I have no cover or because it jumps me to far back and i can’t shoot
But much better with friends
How about a freaking save point? You can only get hit 3 times and you are dead and back to square one. So why do I have to beat 15 levels without getting hit 3 times??

reviews.review_title: Amazing game. reminds me of time crisis
reviews.review_description: I used to play time crisis in the arcades and this game reminds me so much of it. It’s amazing how you feel inside the VR world. Unbelievable game. Can’t wait to finish it.

Super fun so far. Will try to remember to update as I get more time in (have had about 5 runs and tried online but there was no players). It is stressful at times but just stay behind cover and hit your targets.

This is my go-to game when I play the Quest 2, I love this game! It took me about 6hrs over 2 weeks to beat the first game scenario, the Bank Heist (looks like 3 scenarios total). This is definitely worth the money. There’s an “Online” play option, but nobody seems to be on it. (Crisis VRigade 2 is out, so ppl might be on there, I’m not sure.)
When I play it, I spend a lot of time crouched, sitting or on my knees, so be prepared for that. This game doesn’t make you motion sick at all, which I love. I wish the height adjustment had numbers so you know what setting works for you.

If you ever played Time Crisis, you'll be familiar with this game. That said, this is SOOOOO MUCH better! It's great as single player and at least twice as good in multiplayer. I'd give it 6/5 stars if that were possible. This game is total bonkers fun! The last level especially, holy god! Maximum insanium!

Once you come to accept the challenge of no continue, only three lives, and the standard difficulty.... You too will love this game.  

For $6 and I can play the blame game with my best friend as we try to still beat the first level!

A side perk is the shooting range option for practice.  

The trash talk from the computer is comedy.  

I hope the sequel eventually gets co-op and I'll buy that too.
Extremely fun game, very challenging, but doesn't hurt it's fun factor one bit. Definitely a must buy game.

This game is an absolute bargain at 5 bucks. Put it this way - I have played it pretty much every day for the last 2 weeks and have not even beaten the first level but am still having a blast with it. 

If you don't like hard games and if you don't want to - or can't - crouch, crawl, squat, then don't get this game. You will be ducking behind cars and furniture and blind firing and crawling around while shooting. It's the perfect VR game, IMO. 

I will check out the sequel at some point but I think I will be replaying this one for quite a while.
Thanks for update, everything great now.
I just started playing this game and have a lot of fun with it. Only the lowest difficulty is also hard. Don’t likt it that you need to start over.
